prompt: When the second cue appears, choose the best action.
why_v1: Action should change only when the read and board cues support it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the cue set, so the line avoids paying off when the pressure story is working against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding works better because the balanced mixed-game read says the hand is too thin to keep investing once the full downside is counted.
